description: Revocable living trust with two trustees, living settlor, three named beneficiaries, and trust assets described
parsed_text:
TRUST ACCOUNT DUE DILIGENCE FORM
Customer Name: The Harrington Revocable Living Trust
Customer Type: Trust
Trust TIN: XX-XXX8817
Date of Trust Instrument: 2018-11-05
Trust Jurisdiction: California
Mailing Address: 5621 Vineyard Lane, Napa, CA 94558, USA
Phone: (707) 555-0162   Email: trust.admin@harrington.example

SETTLOR
Name: William Harrington   DOB: 1952-04-28   Status: Living
SSN: XXX-XX-4491
ID: Passport P-XXXX0034, Expiration: 2026-09-01

TRUSTEES
Trustee 1: William Harrington (Settlor / Trustee)
Trustee 2: Margaret Harrington (Co-Trustee)   DOB: 1955-01-17
ID: Driver License DL-CA-XX7721, Expiration: 2027-06-30

BENEFICIARIES
1. Emily Harrington (Adult Child) — Revocable interest, contingent on settlor's death
2. Daniel Harrington (Adult Child) — Revocable interest, contingent on settlor's death
3. Harrington Family Charitable Foundation — Residual 10% bequest

TRUST ASSETS
Primary assets: Residential real property (4 parcels, Napa County), brokerage portfolio (estimated value $2.8M), checking account.
Source of Funds: Proceeds from sale of Harrington Vineyards LLC (2021), investment dividends.
Expected Monthly Activity: $55,000

BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP / CONTROL
Control Person: William Harrington (Trustee) — 100% control authority under trust instrument.
Ownership % (control person): 100%
Beneficiaries have no present vested interest while settlor is living.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: None — no PEP associations identified for settlor, trustees, or named beneficiaries.
Sanctions Screening: Clear — OFAC, SDN, and EU consolidated list all negative.
Adverse Media: Clear.
High-Risk Factors: None identified. Domestic trust, documented asset origin.
CDD Level: Standard
Risk Rating: Low
Review Date: 2025-09-12   Reviewer: Karen Nishida

expected_json.source_of_funds: Proceeds from sale of Harrington Vineyards LLC (2021), investment dividends
